role_adherence_notes.linguistic: The agent provided no candidates and no evidence, failing to perform its role.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation, and climate cues correctly.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Focused on plant species (Saguaro) and native ranges.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road markings, utility poles, and infrastructure.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (camera generation, pole style) effectively.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Mexico. The linguistic agent failed to contribute, but the other four agents provided strong, image-grounded evidence. The tournament successfully used the meta/regulatory evidence to distinguish Mexico from the US, which was the only real competitor.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described the arid terrain and Saguaro cactus.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified the Saguaro cactus visible in the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly described the road markings and wooden poles.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly noted the delineator post and pole style.
